controller-local-base.description: Baseline isolated-worktree bootstrap that reports reusable controller-side caches before governed automation starts.

optional_read_only_caches.description: Shared Ansible validation cache that a fresh worktree may reuse without mutating it.
Optional repo-local Packer plugin cache reused across isolated worktrees.

shared-edge-generated-portals.description: Generated portal directories that the shared NGINX edge publication role republishes alongside service routes.

generated_artifacts.description: Generated ops portal static bundle required by shared edge publication.
Generated changelog portal required by shared edge publication.
Generated documentation portal required by shared edge publication.
